description: Kick off implementation from reviewed plans, enforce per-commit code review and follow-up bead closure, then run completion signoff, wiring review, and validation harnesses until the corpus is fully signed off.

scope.description: Plan batch, component group, or corpus scope being implemented

bead_epic.description: Optional implementation epic to anchor bead verification and follow-up work

steps.title: Verify {{scope}} is ready for implementation
steps.description: Look for the plan index, the selected plan docs, and any implementation guide. Confirm every plan in {{scope}} has completed the review stage and is at least Seam Reviewed. If any plan is still Draft, In Review, or otherwise not ready, abort implementation kickoff and send the scope back to run-plan-review.

steps.title: Verify implementation beads already exist
steps.description: Look for the implementation epic and task beads created from the reviewed plans. If {{bead_epic}} is provided, start there; otherwise discover the right epic from the plan index and bead graph. Confirm the epic and tasks match the plan docs and identify any missing, duplicate, or incorrectly sized implementation tasks.

steps.title: Create or correct missing implementation beads
steps.description: If bead coverage is incomplete or wrong, re-read the plan index, plan docs, and implementation guide if present, then run plan-to-beads or apply targeted bead fixes so the implementation epic and task graph accurately represent the reviewed plans before assignment begins. Prefer attaching repairs to {{bead_epic}} when it is provided and correct.

steps.title: Discover the working team for {{scope}}
steps.description: Use h2 list and repo context to figure out who the implementation team is before assigning work. Look for pod membership, name prefixes or suffixes, active coder and reviewer agents, and any other context clues that indicate which agents belong to the same working group for this project.

steps.title: Assign ready beads to pod coders
steps.description: Assign the ready implementation beads to the coders you identified for this pod or working team and require each coder to request review as they commit work.

steps.title: Monitor implementation commits and review coverage
steps.description: Track commits as they land, verify reviewers have reviewed each one, and keep implementation moving until all planned beads are either complete or converted into follow-up work.

steps.title: Audit for stubs, mocks, wiring gaps, and unplanned compatibility behavior
steps.description: Inspect in-flight work for mocked or stubbed logic, missing wiring, or backwards-compatibility behavior that was not explicitly called for in the plans, and escalate these as implementation defects.

steps.title: Create and assign follow-up beads for bugs or review findings
steps.description: Create new beads under the same implementation epic for bugs, review issues, or red flags discovered during implementation. If {{bead_epic}} is provided and valid, use it; otherwise use the discovered implementation epic. Assign the follow-up work alongside the planned work until nothing remains unresolved.

steps.title: Drive all implementation and follow-up beads to completion
steps.description: Keep the implementation loop running until the original beads and every follow-up bead, including lower-priority work, are completed and reviewed.

steps.title: Run plan-work-completion-signoff for {{scope}}
steps.description: Look for the plan index, the reviewed plan docs, companion test harness docs, and the implemented code packages for this scope, then run plan-work-completion-signoff. Create any resulting signoff beads and repeat until every plan in scope reaches Implementation Complete.

steps.title: Run end-to-end wiring review
steps.description: Look for the critical end-to-end flows, the relevant plans, and the implemented seams across this scope, then perform the post-implementation wiring review pass. Create follow-up beads for any defects regardless of priority and keep iterating until the wiring review is clean.

steps.title: Run the validation harness
steps.description: Look for the test harness docs, existing validation tooling, and any project-level validation commands for this scope, then execute the appropriate final validation harness only after implementation, signoff, wiring review, and all follow-up beads are complete.
